baseline.observed: normalize_chat_endpoint("   ") produced /chat/completions, which would force a malformed request instead of using the default endpoint.

red_test.result: FAILED before implementation because blank input normalized to /chat/completions.

change.summary: Introduced DEFAULT_GLM_CHAT_ENDPOINT and return it when GLM_CODING_ENDPOINT is blank.

verification.result: PASS: Vite build, 29 library tests, 13 CLI tests, and strict clippy passed.

safety_controls: No live GLM call was required for endpoint normalization coverage.
Existing non-empty endpoint normalization behavior is preserved.
Blank endpoint input now fails safe to the documented default.
